title: ourisia coccinea subsp. coccinea
intro: Ourisia coccinea subsp. coccinea, also known as the red flowered orisia, is a flowering plant species native to New Zealand. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms of indigestion. The health benefits of Ourisia coccinea subsp. coccinea include its potential to aid in the treatment of stomach issues, fever reduction, and as an antispasmodic. The herbal preparations of this plant often include infusions, tinctures, and dried flowers, which can be used to make teas or added to medicinal remedies.
